contacts.title: Director of Revenue Management and Digital Marketing
contacts.other_contact_detail: Main hotel switchboard +44 (0)20 7222 7888; reservations@sterminshotel.co.uk (route to revenue/digital team)
contacts.fit_reason: Direct responsibility for revenue management, digital marketing, and distribution channels; primary stakeholder for revenue-tech, AI booking automation, and guest journey optimization.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Strong public confirmation across LinkedIn, industry news on appointment, and multiple directories. Reachable via official hotel contacts listed on sterminshotel.co.uk. No personal email/phone found after search.

contacts.title: General Manager

contacts.fit_reason: Oversees all property operations, commercial strategy, reservations, guest experience, and technology adoption decisions.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Confirmed GM on official careers page (with direct quote), LinkedIn, TripAdvisor management responses, RocketReach, and Companies House as Director. Hotel contact details on official site tie directly to leadership.
